parsed_output.justification: Based on the transcript, Justin began the game as a Robber and therefore had the opportunity to swap into any card via his night ability.  The dialogue shows that after the swap Justin repeatedly mentions the role of a robber, implying he may have exchanged his card for a werewolf—especially since that is the only role that can change one’s alignment to werewolf in this setup.  The other players—Alvin (Seer), James (Villager), and Mitchell (Drunk)—have no indication they ended up as werewolves, while Mitchell’s drunk status meant he only swapped a card from the center and is unlikely to become a werewolf without further evidence.  Consequently, Justin is the most plausible final werewolf.
